name: TakeCareOS
long_description:
TakeCareOS is an AI-first operating system for care agencies. Our platform consolidates every function an agency runs on — rostering, shifts, CRM, care notes, messaging, invoicing, timesheets, and compliance — into one place, with AI agents that automate the admin work coordinators currently do by hand.
Care agencies are one of the most operationally complex small businesses to run, yet most are still managed across a patchwork of spreadsheets, WhatsApp group chats, shared drives, and physical forms. TakeCareOS replaces that fragmentation with a single, intelligent platform that lets agencies run efficiently and scale without adding headcount.
one_liner: AI Operating System for Disability, Aged Care and Home Care Agencies
